title: Probability, Counting, Expected Value, and Risk · Model Lens: Counting Methods
summary: Compare warranties, games, reliability claims, and scheduling risks with transparent assumptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg counting methods increment in a practical risk and expected-value brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use tables, trees, multiplication, permutations, or combinations according to order and replacement.
Interpret conditional probability as a changed reference group.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
